Comment.value:
To be used with CEP adaptation of Demigog's "2nd Edition Style" demilich.
Can be placed as a default resting demilich.  Alternately, simply placing a demilich creature will spawn one of these piles of bones if it doesn't find any hostiles around to attack after 6 seconds.  
See Demilich creature comments for more details.
